hooks.command:
BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current); [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != "main" ] && git push -u origin "$BRANCH" && (gh pr view --json number -q .number 2>/dev/null || gh pr create --base main --fill --body 'Auto-created by Claude Code

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/claude-code)') 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Push et création PR en cours...

hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$branch" ] || [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ] && exit 0; sentinel="/tmp/.jotly_review_${branch//\//_}"; [ -f "$sentinel" ] && exit 0; pr=$(gh pr view --json number,title -q '"PR #\(.number): \(.title)"' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$pr" ] && exit 0; touch "$sentinel"; echo "$pr"; exit 2
hooks.rewakeMessage: Une PR est ouverte sur cette branche. Lance le skill /review pour faire la revue de code.
hooks.rewakeSummary: PR détectée — revue de code automatique
